---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve an engineering skill or repository tool.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Skill or Tool Affected**
e.g., `skills/engineering/plan-with-senior-dev` or `tools/validation/validate_repository.py`.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior.

**Expected behavior**
A clear description of what was expected to happen.
